pr.title: Record: Legal Score-First TTT + Parallel Muon — val_bpb 1.1214 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Legal score-first TTT scores chunks before SGD adaptation on a PR#414-derived Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon stack with BigramHash/VE/XSA tweaks.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adaptation trains SGD on each scored validation chunk before scoring the next, so the eval phase performs validation-shard training.
techniques: Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon optimizer stack
